steps.title: Identify the sentence structure
steps.content: This lists three works, each with a title followed by a comma and description. The blank separates the first item's description from the second item's title.

steps.title: Apply the rule for complex series
steps.content:
When items in a series contain internal commas, separate items with semicolons. Here, place a semicolon after “Lagos” and a comma after “A Kind of Marriage”.

Choices A and C use wrong punctuation between items, and choice D lacks the required comma.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
